content.en:
Time flies.

The Sea of Dimensions has progressed through countless Ultimate Age years, with many wars and chaos in between, but none of them have affected the Terrans.

The Terrans are now the most powerful force in the Dimensional Sea, and even the Celestial Sacred Mountain does not dare to provoke the Terrans.

With Ye Tian's continuous efforts, he used his copying body to perfect his Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Dao countless times, and today he has successfully perfected the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Dao to the level of a medium self-created Ultimate Dao.

Perhaps, compared to some of those Ultimate Extreme Beings, his Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Path was no less than the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Path they had created themselves.

And as the ultimate path of ten thousand laws was perfected to a medium level by "Two One Seven", his ultimate body of ten thousand laws also transformed again, becoming more powerful, and his own strength naturally became stronger.

At the same time, he also created an ultimate arcane art, which is the ultimate arcane that can bring out the strength of the ultimate way of ten thousand laws-Nian Instant!

Nian Instant, the ultimate arcane art, which allows him to reach any place in the sea of dimensions in an instant, regardless of all distances, is also the ultimate arcane that exerts speed to the extreme.

this day.

Ye Xingchen is finally about to comprehend the ultimate rule, what he wants to comprehend is the ultimate rule of ten thousand stars, with Ye Tian's continuous help, he has also broken the shackles in a place like the sea of dimensions, and comprehended a trace of the ultimate rule of ten thousand stars.

As Ye Xingchen comprehended the ultimate rules of Wanxing, he also successfully raised the ultimate body of Wanxing to the Xiaocheng realm, and his body underwent a transformation, stepping into the main realm of the ancient ultimate realm.

"Father, I have already broken through to the Lord Realm of the Ancient Ultimate Realm!"

After Ye Xingchen came out, he said.

"Well, very good, when you reach the Ancient Ultimate Realm Lord Realm, your strength is placed in the entire Dimensional Sea, and you should be second only to that Heaven Viewing Extreme Venerable!" Ye Tian said.

"Father, what is the strength of that Heaven Watching Extreme Venerable?"

Ye Xingchen asked curiously.

Ever since his father returned from the Ultimate Land, that Heavenly Viewing Venerable has been extremely low-key, and has been staying in his Heavenly Viewing Sacred Mountain for retreat and penance, rarely coming out.

He had never seen it before, and even in many wars, this Heaven Viewing Supreme Venerable did not participate in it, and he didn't care about the various changes in the Dimensional Sea and the competition for chance.

"He has already comprehended the ultimate rule, and his current strength is not bad, and he should be at a good level among the ancient level Ultimate Realm Lords. Ye Tian introduced.

He had been interested in spying on the Heavenly Observation Sacred Mountain, and with his strength, that Heavenly Viewing Extreme Venerable naturally couldn't find out, after all, he was now almost beyond the Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord level, and no matter how powerful the Ancient Rank Ultimate Realm Lord was, he was not as good as him.

His control over his body, the strength of his physical body, far surpassed the level of the Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord, if he hadn't wanted the most perfect way to break through to the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, he would have been able to break through a long time ago.

He decided that it would not be long before he could go to the Ultimate Extreme Realm.

It's just because it's almost impossible for him to progress now, and the level of perfection of the ultimate path of the Ten Thousand Laws is already the limit, and if he wants to perfect it, he needs to break through to the ultimate supreme, as well as more knowledge, and have more perceptions, before he can perfect it.

......

Guantian Holy Mountain.

Guantian Jizun was looking forward to it at this time, because Zhangtian Jizun was about to be born.

This is his biggest backer, and it is also his hope for breaking through the ultimate supreme in the future!

If it weren't for this Heavenly Celestial Venerable, he would definitely not be able to break through to his current level now, and he might have died in the calamities again and again.

Airplanes!!!!

A ten-sided crystal emerged, and a shadow appeared inside, and this shadow gradually elongated, and came out of it, gradually condensing a figure, and there was a ten-sided crystal imprint in the figure0......

It is this mark that allows him to break away from the obliteration of the ultimate heaven and earth, even if he fails to break through the ultimate supreme, he can still let an incarnation survive and be resurrected again.

"Hahahaha, my Heavenly Extreme Venerable has finally been resurrected again!!"

Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable said excitedly.

He had studied this treasure for countless years, and finally created a secret method that allowed him to be resurrected, and even had the hope of attacking the ultimate supreme again, but only some hope.

He definitely didn't dare to continue to attack the Ultimate Extreme Venerable now, otherwise once he died, he would be exposed again, and there was a high probability that this treasure would no longer be able to protect him.

Seeing that the Palm Heaven Jizun was resurrected, his whole body exuded an aura that made his heart palpitate, as if a wisp of breath could bombard him.

"Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable, you have been resurrected, is it time to deal with that Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable?" said Guantian Extreme Venerable.

"Naturally, I'm going to deal with him!" Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable said confidently: "My current strength is thirty percent stronger than in the past, and there is no problem in dealing with an Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord." "

As for whether Ye Tian's strength would surpass him, he didn't think about it at all, even those Ultimate Extreme Venerables, before 1.6 had a breakthrough to the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, their combat power was estimated to be inferior to him.

If Ye Tian had already reached the standard of becoming the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, he would have already broken through, and it was impossible to wait until now without a breakthrough.

Then, Ye Tian's strength will definitely not be too strong.

Moreover, he also had this ten-sided crystal treasure, which could restrict Ye Tian's movements and make it impossible for him to escape.

As long as Ye Tian is not his opponent, then he will definitely die.

"I need to rest for a while to get used to this resurrected body, and then I'll do it to the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable right away!" said the Heavenly Extreme Venerable.

"Yes!"
